title: ZDZW Requirement Elicitation
author: Lario Femenia, Joan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A suitable requirements elicitation and analysis procedure for   ZDZW     project is developed according to ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 (ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148:2018-11), ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207 (ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207:2017-11) and ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288 (ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288:2015-05-15). These standards are used as the basis for the requirements elicitation procedure that is aligned to “Stakeholder Needs and Requirements Definition process” (ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207:2017-11, p. 59ff).
steps_raw: A suitable requirements elicitation and analysis procedure for   ZDZW     project is developed according to ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 (ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148:2018-11), ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207 (ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207:2017-11) and ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288 (ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288:2015-05-15). These standards are used as the basis for the requirements elicitation procedure that is aligned to “Stakeholder Needs and Requirements Definition process” (ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207:2017-11, p. 59ff).
keywords: ZDZW; defect; NDI; waste; inspection; detect; zero; quality; non destructive
